scripts.dev: node scripts/assert-docker-runtime.mjs --block-next-dev && node scripts/clean-next-dev.mjs && next dev --turbopack --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:webpack: node scripts/assert-docker-runtime.mjs --block-next-dev && node scripts/clean-next-dev.mjs && next dev --webpack --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: node scripts/prepare-next-build.mjs && pnpm prisma:generate && next build
scripts.docker:build: docker compose exec app pnpm build
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose exec app pnpm prisma:migrate
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec app pnpm seed
scripts.docker:db:sync: docker compose exec app pnpm prisma:migrate && docker compose exec app pnpm prisma:generate && docker compose exec app pnpm seed
